implementation_notes: When adding remediation_summary.json, include both numeric arrays and short-form formulas to support both human and automated verification.
If file-size or preview limits remain, place large numeric tables into remediation_summary.json and reference it from compliance_memo.md; include a 1-2 line summary in the memo pointing to the JSON.
After packaging, run the deterministic precheck and capture its output into actual_outputs/packaging_check.txt to show artifacts are present.

2) Produce remediation_summary.json and include it in artifact_refs.
3) Update compliance_memo.md with Assumptions table and links to the machine-readable summary.
4) Fix internal consistency of final_score/passed fields.
